title: str_contains allocates two Strings for case-insensitive search
description: evaluator.rs:355-362: str_contains with casemap=true calls haystack.to_ascii_lowercase() and needle.to_ascii_lowercase(), allocating two heap Strings per call. This is called for every (header, field_name, key) triple in every :contains test. A sliding-window ASCII case-insensitive comparison, or using a crate like memchr's case-insensitive search, avoids the allocations entirely.
